title: fal.ai animation-agent wrapper shim — closes WO §1.4 FalCloud write side

request_body_shape.input.image_url: string (anchor image; pass-through from tier-plan shot.anchor_image_url, may be empty until ANIM-03 reference packs populate it)

fal_endpoint_schema.source_note: fal.ai queue endpoint schema pinned in shim constants (FAL_QUEUE_BASE/FAL_MODEL_ID) so an API rename is a one-line change rather than a redesign.

happy_path_dry_run.note: Default --submit (no --live) issued zero HTTP calls. Same fingerprint as ANIM-17 cert evidence (95de:0714).

determinism_property_test.method: build_payload(shot=1, tier_plan=falcloud.json) called twice; SHA256 of json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True) compared

leak_check.method: Read live FAL_AI_API_KEY into process memory for assertion only; never persisted; grep against (a) shim source, (b) tier-config JSON, (c) probe harness output, (d) this evidence file
leak_check.note: Raw key bytes do not appear in any persisted file. Fingerprint-only exposure preserved per ANIM-17 R20.

live_safety_proof.claim: Default --submit invocation issues ZERO HTTP calls
live_safety_proof.method: Probe harness exercises 6 negative paths without any urllib.request.urlopen call; happy-path dry-run prints 'DRY-RUN — no HTTP call made.' and returns exit 0 without contacting fal.ai. Live POST requires explicit --live flag.
live_safety_proof.argparse_default: args.live is False by default; submit_shot() branches to DRY_RUN before any urlopen call when live=False

anim17_handover_rules: Do not introduce a new env-key resolution helper.
Do not store the resolved key bytes anywhere outside X:/env_sync/user_portable.json.
Do not relax the leak check.
shim_compliance: Key bytes held in process memory only; written nowhere; passed to Authorization header live, then dropped.
Every probe + every audit JSON pass through fingerprint_only() which strips 'key' field; defensive json round-trip in --submit path.

codex_round_ledger.command: CODEX_MODEL=gpt-5.5 codex exec --model gpt-5.5 --skip-git-repo-check --cd /c/Users/Owner/Repos/code-artifacts < bundle.txt > round1.txt

exit_code_map.14: KEY_OK_SHIM_PENDING (legacy code retained for backward compat in case operator downgrades tier-config)

ledger_convention.rule: each round-N's fixed_in_commit is unknowable inside its own commit; the value is backfilled by the next commit. Final un-backfilled placeholder is resolved at cert-mint time. Documented as the chain-ledger convention in ANIM-14-evidence.json:ledger_convention.
